tasks.label: Xcode: Build & Run
tasks.command: xcodebuild build -scheme Tally -destination 'id=76E28FFB-15E3-440B-8E28-BA8430063D44' -quiet && xcrun simctl install 76E28FFB-15E3-440B-8E28-BA8430063D44 ~/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData/Tally-gwkyjcgfsljiquehaygpffrtaioo/Build/Products/Debug-iphonesimulator/Tally.app && xcrun simctl terminate 76E28FFB-15E3-440B-8E28-BA8430063D44 com.tallyapp.ios 2>/dev/null; xcrun simctl launch 76E28FFB-15E3-440B-8E28-BA8430063D44 com.tallyapp.ios
